match.userMessage:
Classify music design for each scene and generate a unified music prompt for the sequence.

<SCENES>
[
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_001",
    "title": "Reporter Types at Terminal",
    "storyBeat": "Reporter preparing for live broadcast in the newsroom",
    "durationSeconds": 8,
    "location": "INT. NEWSROOM - NIGHT",
    "timeOfDay": "night",
    "visualSummary": "Urgent yet fresh sensory tension under soft cool and warm light mix"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_002",
    "title": "Close Beauty Shot of Reporter's Hands",
    "storyBeat": "Tactile detail emphasizing the typing action",
    "durationSeconds": 4,
    "location": "INT. NEWSROOM - NIGHT",
    "timeOfDay": "night",
    "visualSummary": "Urgent yet calm newsroom energy, sensory and effortlessly cool with real-life immediacy"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_003",
    "title": "Producer Rushes In with Breaking News",
    "storyBeat": "Producer delivers urgent breaking story update",
    "durationSeconds": 7,
    "location": "INT. NEWSROOM - NIGHT",
    "timeOfDay": "night",
    "visualSummary": "Urgent newsroom energy balanced with airy bright freshness and golden warmth accents"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_004",
    "title": "Team Prepares for Live Broadcast",
    "storyBeat": "Final preparation and synchronization before going live",
    "durationSeconds": 10,
    "location": "INT. NEWSROOM - NIGHT",
    "timeOfDay": "night",
    "visualSummary": "Urgent yet fresh and effortlessly cool newsroom energy with high-key clarity and sensory presence."
  }
]
</SCENES>

For each scene, classify:
1. presence: "none"|"minimal"|"moderate"|"full"
2. style: Genre/instrumentation (if music present)
3. mood: Emotional quality (if music present)
4. atmosphere: Environmental atmosphere

Then synthesize unified tags (starting with "instrumental") and a 1-2 sentence prompt for one cohesive music track.

Respond with ONLY valid JSON matching the schema.
